layoutRegions.name: leak-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for leaked fingerprints, contained items, investigations, and exposed hits.

layoutRegions.name: fingerprint-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Leaked secret fingerprint inventory with source, affected workspace, and containment state.

layoutRegions.name: timeline-and-evidence-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Exposure timeline, scanner evidence, containment status, and cleanup proof.

components.name: FingerprintCard
components.purpose: Focusable leaked secret card with fingerprint, source, workspace, and state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes contained, investigate, and exposed findings

components.name: ExposureEvent
components.purpose: Timeline event with scanner evidence and containment state.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review
event evidence remains readable at narrow widths

components.name: CleanupCheck
components.purpose: Cleanup verification item with owner and proof expectation.

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
